title: data-model-reviewer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the data-model-reviewer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

include_related.description: Example from AGENT.md: comma-separated list; else inferred from `EntityDefinition` relationships Required column: 'no'.
include_related.example: comma-separated list; else inferred from `EntityDefinition` relationships
